title: Iris Sepperin Collab
description:
Finally, after months and months of waiting, here it is. The Iris Sepperin Collab!

I started this collab in September 2012 and some parts are a bit old, but I hope you enjoy this anyway.

EDIT: My apologies to mydedisbroken, he sent me his part but I didn't find it anywhere (Downloads folder/Documents folder/the collab folder) so I thought he didn't, and I ended up replacing him... I'm sorry. His entry here: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fIPU5Kppw4U

Participants (in order of appearance):
-AleUchihaKuchik
-raphaelgoulart
